---
image: "featured.jpg"
title: "?"
author: 
  - name: Satoshi Koiso
subtitle: "*Physical Review*"
description: "One is thus led to conclude that the description of reality as given by a wave function is not complete."
started: "2025"
ended: "2026"
funding: "$0"
---

<!--Include academic icons or bottons-->

{{< include /files/includes/_academic.qmd >}}


## Abstract
